feedback.text: This initiative is important and necessary. However, I believe that it could include protection so that software consumers (especially video games but also many consumer products) do not lose access to their purchase when the publisher decides to finalise their medium to the product. It currently happens especially in video games that require a connection to a server that the company can shut down at any time. But also in many softwares related to the Internet of Things, household appliances that remain unusable because the manufacturer does not use an app, etc. It is important that manufacturers and publishers design their verification systems with the option that the consumer can continue to use the purchased product.
